# GitHub Copilot Instructions

This repository directory is the standalone ATI Holidays `ati-theme-2026` block theme. Treat `DESIGN.md` and `theme.json` as the source of truth. Do not reintroduce child-theme architecture, `ati-theme-2026` namespace strings, legacy colour aliases, or Ollie default palettes.

Use block-theme-native files first: `theme.json`, `styles/**/*.json`, `templates/*.html`, `parts/*.html`, and `patterns/*.php`. Keep Tour Operator block output compatible while moving styling to ATI tokens.
